symptom: disproportionately short limbs with a normal-length trunk since birth
hook: the spinal canal narrowed going down instead of widening, with squared-off pelvic wings
whatYouSee: The spacing of the lumbar spinal canal narrows as it goes down, with square pelvic wings and short, stubby long bones.
whyItMatters: It is the most common form of disproportionate short stature; the narrowing spinal canal predisposes to spinal stenosis and cord or nerve compression.
treatment: Care is supportive and orthopaedic, treating spinal stenosis, foramen magnum compression and limb issues as they arise.
takeaway: A lumbar canal that narrows going down with short limbs is achondroplasia.

condition.symptom: disproportionately short limbs with a normal-length trunk since birth
condition.hook: the spinal canal narrowed going down instead of widening, with squared-off pelvic wings
condition.keyFindings: narrowing interpedicular distance descending the lumbar spine, squared iliac wings with champagne-glass pelvic inlet, short proximal long bones and trident hands
condition.whatYouSee: The spacing of the lumbar spinal canal narrows as it goes down, with square pelvic wings and short, stubby long bones.
condition.whyItMatters: It is the most common form of disproportionate short stature; the narrowing spinal canal predisposes to spinal stenosis and cord or nerve compression.

condition.takeaway: A lumbar canal that narrows going down with short limbs is achondroplasia.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Achondroplasia
👀 What you see:
The spacing of the lumbar spinal canal narrows as it goes down, with square pelvic wings and short, stubby long bones.
🦴 Why it matters:
It is the most common form of disproportionate short stature; the narrowing spinal canal predisposes to spinal stenosis and cord or nerve compression.
💊 Treatment:
Care is supportive and orthopaedic, treating spinal stenosis, foramen magnum compression and limb issues as they arise.
📝 Takeaway:
A lumbar canal that narrows going down with short limbs is achondroplasia.
generated.igCaption:
Case File 07. 🩻

Born the same size as everyone else — just not in the same proportions.
The spine narrows where it should open up. The pelvis wings go square instead of round.
Something in the blueprint changed before day one.

A real condition most people have never seen.

So before you swipe: A, B, or C? 👉
